panel_used: Panel a only (STAMP-style extended error-bar plot: 'Means in groups' bar chart + 'Difference between groups' 95% CI dot plot for Control vs NBNC-HCC), matching group_0=healthy controls / group_1=non-HBV non-HCV related HCC (NBNC-HCC). Panels b (Control vs B-HCC) and c (NBNC-HCC vs B-HCC) compare different group pairs and were ignored.
color_map: Orange = Control (group_0); blue = NBNC-HCC (group_1). The CI dot in the right-hand plot is colored to match whichever group has the higher mean (confirmed against the 'Means in groups' bar heights for each taxon).
notes: All 5 taxa in panel a are legible from bar heights and CI-dot color. Megamonas, Lachnospira, Eubacterium ventriosum group, and Lachnospiraceae UCG 001 all show taller orange (Control) bars and orange-colored CI dots (positive difference), i.e. lower in NBNC-HCC. Anaerotruncus is the sole exception: pixel-level zoom confirmed the blue (NBNC-HCC) bar is taller than the orange bar, and its CI dot is blue and sits left of zero, i.e. higher in NBNC-HCC.
